overall.description: First-person gameplay footage walking along a dirt trail through grassy terrain at night, illuminated by a warm flashlight. The player approaches a dark forest tree line and passes a wooden cabin with a lit window on the left side of the path.

agents.ego_description: walking steadily along the dirt path using a flashlight to illuminate the way ahead toward the dark tree line

entered.detail: narrow dirt trail with scattered stones winding through the grass
tall green grass lining the left side of the trail
tall green grass and bushes lining the right side of the trail
dark silhouette of dense trees forming the horizon ahead

segments.scene_description: The segment shows a first-person view walking along a dirt trail through open grassland at night. The flashlight illuminates the path ahead, revealing tall grass on both sides and a dark forest tree line in the distance. The environment is empty and quiet, with clear night skies visible above.

events.description: wooden cabin with lit window becomes visible on the left side of the path

agents.ego_description: continuing to walk forward along the trail as the forest approaches and a wooden structure comes into view on the left

entered.detail: small wooden structure with vertical planks and a warm light glowing from a window

segments.scene_description: As the camera continues walking, the tree line draws closer and a wooden cabin with a lit window emerges on the left side of the path. The flashlight beam reveals more detail of the cabin's plank walls while the right side remains lined with tall grass. The forest ahead becomes more prominent as the distance closes.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey along a dark dirt trail that transitions from an open grassland into the proximity of a secluded forest dwelling. It begins by moving through expansive fields of tall grass under a clear night sky, with a warm flashlight beam cutting through the darkness toward a distant tree line. As the camera advances, the open terrain narrows and the forest ahead becomes more prominent and imposing. The scene then shifts as a wooden cabin emerges on the left, its lit window and plank walls momentarily illuminated by the flashlight before the path leads further toward the encroaching woods.
